mnemonics: ARMA's Parts: AR is AutoRegressive (past values), MA is Moving Average (past errors)
keyPoints: Stationarity requires constant mean and variance over time
AR models use past values to predict future ones
MA models use past forecast errors to predict future values
commonMistakes: Assuming a series is stationary without testing
Confusing AR (AutoRegressive) with MA (Moving Average) components
Overfitting the model with too many parameters
